title: Channel Sales Executive (East/5 Days/Up to $4,500)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a driven and energetic Channel Sales Executive to join our growing team. In this role, you’ll help expand our channel footprint, support reseller partners, and drive revenue growth across our portfolio of cybersecurity, networking, and infrastructure solutions.

Key Responsibilities

  • Manage and grow a portfolio of existing reseller partners, identifying upsell/cross-sell opportunities.
  • Source and develop new channel partners through prospecting, outreach, and relationship building.
  • Respond to quotation requests, prepare proposals, and track all sales activities in CRM.
  • Provide pre-sales support in collaboration with product managers to recommend suitable solutions.
  • Coordinate order processing, including overseas transactions when required.
  • Deliver timely updates on sales pipeline, forecasting, and weekly sales activities.
  • Support partners with product updates, promotional programs, and marketing events.
  • Work closely with internal teams (Product, Operations, Finance) to ensure smooth deal execution.
  • Provide excellent customer service and ensure partner satisfaction.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Business, IT, or related disciplines.
  • 1–3 years of sales or channel experience preferred (IT distribution highly advantageous).
  • Strong communication, relationship-building, and presentation skills.
  • Self-driven, proactive, and customer-oriented.


We appreciate your interest and look forward to reviewing your application. Due to high application volume, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted — thank you for your understanding!

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
